hooks.prompt:
Review all files modified during this session under C:\Users\Administrator\Documents\=tk\. Check whether PROJECT_INDEX.md needs updating. Update it if any of these happened:
- A new module file was created in tiktok_analyzer/
- An existing module's responsibility, inputs, or outputs changed significantly
- The data flow or pipeline order changed
- A new config section was added to config.yaml
- A new遗留问题 was resolved or a new one was added
- A new database/cache file was introduced

Also update relevant memory files in C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator\memory\ if project facts changed.

Be precise and minimal — don't change what's already correct. If nothing substantive changed, don't touch the files.

hooks.command: echo "--- $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') ---" >> "$HOME/Documents/=tk/.claude/session.log" && py -m pip cache purge 2>/dev/null; exit 0
